attacking_style: Pure sprinter who launches final effort in last 200-300m. Thrives in disorganized, chaotic finishes where positioning gaps emerge rather than structured leadouts.
team_tactics: Team employs blocking tactics (road choking 1200m out) to disrupt rivals' positioning, creating chaos that suits Modolo's opportunistic style over organized trains.
terrain_preference: Flat bunch sprints with disorganized or compromised finales. Struggles when pure speed is required in perfectly structured sprints against top-tier sprinters.
vulnerability: Launches sprint too early and fades when forced to go from distance. Lacks finishing speed when team tactics succeed but rider form doesn't match. Can be intimidated/boxed by stronger sprinters.
key_patterns: Excels specifically in chaotic, messy sprints where organization collapses (3 observations).
Finds unconventional gaps through center or broken positioning when leadouts fail (2 observations).
Team blocking tactics frequently better than his finishing execution (2 observations).
Timing issues: launches too early and fades in pure speed contests (2 observations).
form_trajectory: neutral: 2021 win ended long drought but came in disorganized finale; 2018 form showed team tactics outperforming rider capabilities
